instruction:
Calculate the integral
$$
\int_{-\infty}^{+\infty} \frac{x^{2}}{(x^{2}+a^{2})^{2}} \mathrm{d} x \quad (a > 0)
$$

Options:
A. $$\frac{ŽĆa^{2}}{4}$$
B. $$\frac{ŽĆa}{2}$$
C. $$\frac{1}{2a^{2}}$$
D. $$\frac{ŽĆ}{4a}$$
E. $$\frac{1}{a^{2}}$$
F. $$\frac{ŽĆ^{2}}{2a}$$
G. $$\frac{ŽĆ}{2a}$$
H. $$\frac{ŽĆ}{a^{3}}$$
I. $$\frac{a}{2ŽĆ}$$
J. $$\frac{2a}{ŽĆ}$$
